page.title: Shopping Cart
page.shippingNote: Shipping will be calculated in the next step

buyBox.overBudgetHint: This product has too many options to list here. Open a specific variant link to buy.
buyBox.externalHint: Options for this product are selected in a custom experience. Open a specific variant link to buy.

attributes.shippingBody: Free shipping on orders over {freeShippingThreshold}. Standard delivery 3-5 business days.
attributes.returnsBody: Free returns within {returnsWindowDays} days of purchase. Items must be unworn with tags attached.

search.title: Search
search.description: Search our full collection of products.
search.resultCount: {count, plural, one {# product found} other {# products found}}
search.noResultsBody: We couldn't find any products matching your search. Try a different term or browse our categories.

nav.cartButton: {count, plural, one {# item in cart, view bag} other {# items in cart, view bag}}

metadata.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to access your orders and saved addresses.
metadata.signupDescription: Create a new account to save your addresses and order history.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.invalidEmailFirst: Please enter a valid email address first
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
errors.invalidResetToken: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.invalidConfirmToken: This confirmation link has expired or was already used. Try signing in or register again.
errors.loadOrdersFailed: We couldn't load your orders. Please try again in a moment.
errors.loadOrderFailed: We couldn't load this order. Please try again.
errors.loadRecentOrdersFailed: We couldn't load your recent orders.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.resetSent: If an account exists for {email}, a password reset link has been sent. Note: You can only request one reset link every 15 minutes.

signup.title: Create an Account
signup.successBody: Please check your email to verify your account.
signup.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

setPassword.title: Set New Password
setPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for {email}
setPassword.successBody: Your password has been successfully reset. You are now signed in.

confirm.successBody: Your account for {email} is active. Sign in with the password you created.

overview.subtitle: Here is an overview of your account activity.
overview.noOrdersYet: You haven't placed any orders yet.

orders.title: Orders
orders.count: {count, plural, =0 {No orders yet} one {# order} other {# orders}}
orders.empty: You haven't placed any orders yet.
orders.signInRequired: Sign in to view your orders.

orderDetail.signInRequired: Sign in to view this order.
orderDetail.loadFailed: We couldn't load this order. Please try again.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.subtitle: Manage your saved addresses
addresses.addAddressDescription: Add a new address to your account

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently remove your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.confirmBody: This action cannot be undone. You will receive a confirmation email before your account is deleted.
deleteAccount.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox to complete account deletion.

unavailable.title: Unable to load your account
unavailable.body: The store is temporarily unavailable. Refresh the page or try again in a moment.

errors.sessionExpiredMessage: This cart is no longer available. Add items again to start a new checkout.
errors.loadFailedMessage: We had trouble loading your cart. Please try again or start a new checkout from the store.
errors.orderNotFoundMessage: We couldn't find this order. It may have been removed or the link is invalid.
errors.orphanedCartMessage: This cart is still linked to a signed-in account. To check out as a guest, start a fresh anonymous cart with the same items, or log in instead.
errors.orphanedCartBlocked: This cart is still linked to a signed-in account. Continue as guest above, or log in.
errors.discountApplyFailed: This discount code could not be applied.
errors.crashMessage: Something went wrong loading checkout. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact
contact.createAccountLabel: Create an account for faster checkout next time
contact.activationNotice: After checkout, you'll receive an email to activate your account before you can sign in.
contact.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account

shipping.noAddressYet: Please go back and enter your shipping address first.
shipping.emptySavedShipping: You don't have any saved addresses yet. Please enter your shipping address below.

addresses.setDefaultShipping: Set as my default shipping address
addresses.setDefaultBilling: Set as my default billing address
addresses.emptySaved: You don't have any saved addresses yet.

payment.totalUpdatedBody: The total changed from {previous} to {next}. Review the updated order summary before completing your payment.
payment.deliveryInvalidBody: Please go back to the shipping step and select a valid shipping method before completing your order.
payment.completingBody: We're confirming your payment and creating your order. This usually takes a few seconds — please don't close or refresh this page.
payment.unavailable: Payment system is not available. Please try again.
payment.securingWithStripe: We're securing your payment with Stripe. This usually takes a few seconds.
payment.doNotClose: Please don't close or refresh this page.
payment.completeOrderFailed: Could not complete your order. Please try again.
payment.placeOrderFailed: Could not place your order. Please try again or contact support.
payment.totalsRefreshFailed: Could not refresh checkout totals. Please try again.
payment.totalUnavailable: Checkout total is unavailable. Please refresh the page and try again.
payment.currencyUnavailable: Checkout currency is unavailable. Please refresh the page and try again.
payment.methodRequired: Could not determine the selected payment method. Please choose a payment option and try again.
payment.detailsUnavailable: Could not retrieve payment details. Please try again.
payment.expressReset: The express checkout buttons were reset before payment could be confirmed. Please try again.
payment.formReset: The payment form was reset before your card could be confirmed. Please try Pay again without refreshing the page.
payment.totalChanged: Order total changed. Review the updated amount and try again.
payment.bankDeclined: Your bank declined the payment. Please try again or use a different card.
payment.sessionExpired: Payment session expired after redirect. Please try again.
payment.channelUnresolved: Could not resolve checkout channel after payment. Please contact support.
payment.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while completing your payment.
payment.stripeKeyMissing: Stripe publishable key is missing. Check Stripe app configuration in Saleor Dashboard.
payment.interruptedBeforeCharge: Payment was interrupted before you were charged. You can safely try again.
payment.interruptedAfterAuthorize: Your payment went through, but your order has not been placed yet. Do not pay again — use “Complete order” below to finish.
payment.verificationUnavailable: We could not verify your previous payment attempt. Please refresh the page — do not pay again until it is verified.
payment.authorizedBody: Your payment is authorized (capture happens when we fulfill the order). Tap below to place your order — you will not be charged again at checkout.
payment.freeOrderBody: Your order total is {total}. No payment is required — confirm below to place your order.
payment.dummyTestMode: Test mode. No card details needed — use Pay to complete a test order.

confirmation.confirmedEmail: You'll receive a confirmation email at {email}

server.invalidRedirectUrl: Invalid redirect URL. See server logs for more information.
server.totalVerifyFailed: Could not verify the checkout total. Please try again.
server.totalChanged: The checkout total has changed. Please review your order and try again.
server.paymentsDisabled: Payments are not enabled in this environment.
server.orderCreateFailed: Payment was processed but the order could not be created. Please try again or contact support.
server.dummyNotAllowed: Test payment is not available in this environment.
server.stripeNotEnabled: Stripe payments are not enabled in this environment. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_STRIPE_PAYMENTS=true on the storefront.

gateways.noneBody: To accept payments, install a payment app (like Saleor Dummy Payment for testing, or Stripe/Adyen for production) from the Saleor Dashboard.
gateways.unsupportedList: This checkout does not support the available payment gateway(s): {gateways}.
gateways.unsupportedEmpty: No supported payment gateway is available for this checkout.
gateways.dummyMissingTitle: Dummy Payment not available on this checkout
gateways.dummyMissingBody: Dummy Payment App is installed, but it is not available for this checkout. In Saleor Dashboard, check the app is active, webhooks are delivering successfully, and the checkout currency is supported (USD for the hosted app).
gateways.noGatewayConfigured: No payment gateway configured. Please contact support or configure a payment app in Saleor.
gateways.stripeUseCardForm: Stripe payment is handled by the card form. Complete payment using the Stripe payment section above.
gateways.paymentWebhookFailed: Payment app webhook failed. In Saleor Dashboard → Apps → Dummy Payment App, check webhook deliveries are succeeding.
gateways.paymentInitFailed: Payment could not be initialized. Check that the payment app is running in Saleor.
